intended_use: Analysis and reporting of vascular ultrasound images.
intended_use_full: Analysis and reporting of vascular ultrasound images.
target_condition: Carotid and lower limb artery vascular disease assessment
ground_truth: Expert reader annotations and clinician measurements for IMT; clinician annotations for doppler velocities and waveform types
other_metrics: IMT correlation coefficient: 0.89 with average of two expert readers (subject device) vs 0.6 for predicate device; correlation coefficient 0.98 for PSV reading; correlation coefficient 0.97 for EDV reading
